OpenAPI Reference

Projects

GET List projects

POST Create a project

GET Get a project

PUT Update a project

DELETE Delete a project

Notes

GET List notes

POST Create a note

GET Get a note

PUT Update a note

DELETE Delete a note

POST Search notes

Memories

GET List memories

POST Store a memory

GET Get a memory

PUT Update a memory

DELETE Delete a memory

POST Search memories

GET Suggest memory tags

URLs

GET List URLs

POST Save a URL

GET Get a URL

PUT Update a URL

DELETE Delete a URL

POST Search URLs

Batch

POST Batch delete items

POST Batch move items to a project

POST Batch copy items to a project

Search

POST Search across all collections

POST Search knowledge (notes + memories + URLs + pages)

Utility

POST Resolve IDs to titles

GET Get project item counts

POST Reindex Typesense collections

AI Chat

POST AI-powered chat with intent classification

GET List recent conversations

DELETE Delete a conversation

POST AI-powered chat search (legacy)

Trash

GET List trashed items

DELETE Empty trash

GET Get trash item count

POST Restore a trashed item

DELETE Permanently delete a trashed item

POST Batch restore trashed items

POST Batch permanently delete trashed items

Graph

POST Create a link between two items

DELETE Delete a link

GET Get all links for an item

GET Get the knowledge graph data (nodes and edges)

v1.0.0

Kumbukum API​

Download OpenAPI Document
JSON
Download OpenAPI Document
YAML

Everything your AI needs to remember — Notes, Memory, URLs, AI Chat

Servers​

https://your-instance.example.com/api/v1API v1

Projects​

Operations​

GET/projectsPOST/projectsGET/projects/{id}PUT/projects/{id}DELETE/projects/{id}

List projects​

GET
/projects

Authorizations​

BearerAuth

JWT token from login

Type
HTTP (bearer)
or
AccessToken

Personal access token. Value: Token <your-token>

Type
API Key (header: Authorization)

Responses​

OK

application/json
JSON
{
  
"projects": [
  
  
{
  
  
  
"_id": "string",
  
  
  
"name": "string",
  
  
  
"color": "string",
  
  
  
"host_id": "string"
  
  
}
  
]
}
GET
/projects

page
Type
integer
Default

limit

integer
Default
50

Operations​

/urls

Authorizations​

BearerAuth

JWT token from login

Type
HTTP (bearer)
or
AccessToken

Personal access token. Value: Token <your-token>

Type
API Key (header: Authorization)

Parameters​

Query Parameters

page
Type
integer
Default
1
limit
Type
integer
Default
50
project

Filter by project ID

Type
string

Responses​

OK

application/json
JSON
{
  
"urls": [
  
  
{
  
  
  
"_id": "string",
  
  
  
"title": "string",
  
  
  
"url": "string",
  
  
  
"project": "string",
  
  
  
"crawl_enabled": true,
  
  
  
"host_id": "string",
  
  
  
"createdAt": "string",
  
  
  
"updatedAt": "string"
  
  
}
  
]
}
GET
/urls

Samples​

AI Chat​

Operations​

POST/chatGET/chat/conversationsDELETE/chat/conversations/{id}POST/chat/search

AI-powered chat with intent classification​

POST
/chat

Classifies the query intent (search, action, analysis, conversation), routes to the appropriate handler, and returns results + conversational answer. Results are displayed in the main panel.

Authorizations​

BearerAuth

JWT token from login

Type
HTTP (bearer)
or
AccessToken

Personal access token. Value: Token <your-token>

Type
API Key (header: Authorization)

Request Body​

application/json
JSON
{
  
"query": "string",
  
"conversation_id": "string",
  
"project_id": "string"
}

Responses​

OK

application/json
JSON
{
  
"answer": "string",
  
"results": [
  
  
{
  
  
}
  
],
  
"action": {
  
},
  
"conversation_id": "string",

Samples​

Get the knowledge graph data (nodes and edges)​

GET
/graph

Authorizations​

BearerAuth

JWT token from login

Type
HTTP (bearer)
or
AccessToken

Personal access token. Value: Token <your-token>

Type
API Key (header: Authorization)

Parameters​

Query Parameters

project_id

Filter by project

Type
string
include_tags

Include tag-based edges

Type
string
Default
"true"
include_semantic

Include semantic similarity edges

Type
string
Default
"false"
semantic_threshold

Semantic similarity threshold

Type
number
Default
0.7

Responses​

OK

application/json
JSON
{
  
"nodes": [
  
  
{
  
  
}
  
],
  
"edges": [
  
  
{
  
  
}
  
]
}
GET
/graph
